title: Pope Leo’s encyclical on AI is a striking manifesto of Christian humanism
description: Rite and Reason: Magnifica Humanitas considers what it might mean to safeguard the best parts of being human in the time of artificial intelligence
content: When drawing up a list of people to consult on technological developments, the Bishop of Rome would not be near the top of many people’s rankings. But this week, Pope Leo XIV published a 42,000-word teaching on the ethical and political implications ... [4886 chars]

title: SoftBank to build up AI data centres in France with major investment
description: PARIS, May 30 (Reuters) - ⁠Japan's SoftBank Group will invest €45 billion over the ⁠next five years in a push to build ‌up artificial intelligence infrastructure in France, founder Masayoshi Son told the paper La Tribune Dimanche in an interview published on Saturday.

title: Centre unveils AI-enabled chatbot to help citizens launch grievances online
description: NEW DELHI, May 30: The Centre today unveiled an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-enabled chatbot to help citizens raise grievances against Government Departments online. Launching the chatbot named ‘Samadhan Didi’ here, Union Minister of State for Personnel Jitendra Singh termed it as “democratisation of the public grievance mechanism” in the nation showcasing the government’s unwavering commitment to enhance ease of using public services for citizens. The chatbot marks a significant step towards making public grievance redressal simpler, more accessible and truly multilingual, […]
content:

title: SoftBank to spend $87.5 billion on AI centres in France: Son
description: Japanese tech investor SoftBank will spend 75 billion euros ($87.5 billion) on artificial intelligence infrastructure in France, its founder Masayoshi Son told a French newspaper in an interview released Saturday. "75 billion euros in total," Son told La Tribune Dimanche weekly ahead of a French investment conference hosted by President Emmanuel Macron.

description: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to invest as much as €75 billion ($87 billion) to build artificial intelligence data centers in France, La Tribune and the Financial Times reported.
content:
